name: Network School Acute Assist Claim Evidence
description: Evidence bundle and operator-attested review schema for the Network School Acute Assist 30-day pilot.

requiredFacts.label: Network School membership
requiredFacts.description: Off-chain verifier confirms Network School eligibility before activation. Store only verifier reference hashes on-chain.

requiredFacts.label: Activation window
requiredFacts.description: Activation timestamp and 30-day active window for the selected tier.

requiredFacts.label: Incident window
requiredFacts.description: Date and time of the acute illness or injury inside the active window.

requiredFacts.label: Care location
requiredFacts.description: Facility name, city, country, and proof that care happened in the supported travel or abroad context.

requiredFacts.label: Billing proof
requiredFacts.description: Receipt, itemized invoice, or bill plus proof of payment when reimbursement review is required.

requiredFacts.label: Post-activation attestation
requiredFacts.description: Member attests that symptoms or the event began after activation and no excluded category applies.

decisionStates.label: Hold
decisionStates.description: Insufficient confidence, missing evidence, verifier issue, or exclusion review still pending.

decisionStates.label: Approve
decisionStates.description: Operator-backed oracle review approved the claim and set the payable amount.

decisionStates.label: Partial approve
decisionStates.description: Only part of the submitted amount is eligible after excess, reimbursement percentage, limits, sublimits, or pool caps.

decisionStates.label: Deny
decisionStates.description: Claim failed activation, waiting-period, exclusion, fraud, territory, cap, or evidence requirements.

decisionStates.label: Dispute
decisionStates.description: Appeal or operator escalation is active before final settlement.

supportingFields.label: Care type
supportingFields.description: pharmacy, clinic, urgent care, ER, hospital, or other approved acute care type.

supportingFields.label: Eligible bill amount
supportingFields.description: Approved eligible expense amount before the 50 USD excess and 80 percent reimbursement rule.

supportingFields.label: Decision support hash
supportingFields.description: Hash commitment to the off-chain operator review packet or recommendation bundle.
